flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Howard College rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.4k → $6.7k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Howard College rose 23% between 2017 and 2020 ($7.7k → $9.5k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Howard College fell 13% between 2006 and 2009 (22.0% → 19.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Howard College fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8k → 1.6k).
